creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #4)
Yes I tested it, and it worked for me.

I did some digging and it looks like it is missing a BUILD_DEPEND on gputils which is rather odd - I would have expected the package build to blow long before now up in that case.

I've updated the patch with the fixes you have suggested.
